PG.name: pressure gauge
PG.verification_note: Local pressure indication supports zero-pressure verification but does not prove isolation by itself.

PI.name: pressure indicator
PI.verification_note: Local pressure indication supports zero-pressure verification but does not prove isolation by itself.

PT.name: pressure transmitter
PT.verification_note: Remote pressure transmission is supporting context only unless site procedure accepts it.

PIC.name: pressure indicating controller
PIC.verification_note: Controller state is not an energy-isolating device and does not prove isolation.

LG.name: level gauge
LG.verification_note: Level indication supports inventory/drain-down checks but does not prove zero pressure.

LI.name: level indicator
LI.verification_note: Level indication supports inventory/drain-down checks but does not prove zero pressure.

LT.name: level transmitter
LT.verification_note: Remote level transmission is supporting context only unless site procedure accepts it.

LIC.name: level indicating controller
LIC.verification_note: Controller state is not an energy-isolating device and does not prove isolation.

FI.name: flow indicator
FI.verification_note: No-flow indication is supporting context only and does not prove isolation.

FT.name: flow transmitter
FT.verification_note: Remote flow transmission is supporting context only.

FIC.name: flow indicating controller
FIC.verification_note: Controller state is not an energy-isolating device and does not prove isolation.

TI.name: temperature indicator
TI.verification_note: Temperature indication supports cooldown checks but does not prove process isolation.

TT.name: temperature transmitter
TT.verification_note: Remote temperature transmission is supporting context only.

TIC.name: temperature indicating controller
TIC.verification_note: Controller state is not an energy-isolating device and does not prove isolation.

PAH.name: pressure alarm high
PAH.verification_note: Alarm state is supporting context only.

PAL.name: pressure alarm low
PAL.verification_note: Alarm state is supporting context only.

LAH.name: level alarm high
LAH.verification_note: Alarm state is supporting context only.

LAL.name: level alarm low
LAL.verification_note: Alarm state is supporting context only.
